title: Lux's Pink Sun
description: A pretty pink sun to compliment your pretty pink world!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1320874825895383090/1321188842388062238/luxs_pink_sun.png?ex=676c547e&is=676b02fe&hm=1800effe3bb0553bb5ff6855e14bedc14137165faf171a8f0cc4b3ef2a0d4ccd&)

## **Minecraft: Java Edition - Pink Sun Resourcepack**

Have you ever wanted the sun to be pink? Me too! Download this aesthetic resource pack to enhance your previously boring celestial body to be more... Well, pink! You can now watch a bright pink sunrise. 

---

## **Tips**

Place this pack on top of other packs to overwrite the sun and leave everything else the same! The only file modified is the sun texture.

Since the location of that texture hasn't changed, this pack can be used on virtually any modern version of Minecraft. Enjoy!
